free_text: Proton-induced alpha- and tritium-emission at 72 MeV.
(data identical to data on fig.2 in Nuovo
presented on fig. as a curve).
Experiment was done at 72 MeV for 12C, 27Al, 58Ni,
But in several publications energy was varied between
72. to 72.3 MeV. For example, see articles mentioned
in ref. of this Entry. Compiler believes that it will
be preferable to use one energy: 72. MeV.
(cross-sections were given as a function of the
effective excitation energy - real excitation energy
